title: 若駒Sの後に・負けども夏は来る

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Not bad at all. At least I had a good showing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's all this cheering?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! Thanks for the support! Hehehe, I
was pretty cool, wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not done yet! Don't take your eyes off me
for a second!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I promise here and now that I will continue to
exceed everyone's expectations!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio signing out! See ya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The crowd was going wild. I guess that's Teio for
you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It was stupid of me to challenge someone like
that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And guess what? I'm right back here
again—reaching out for something that doesn't
belong to me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I feel so dumb.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She's so bright...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm back...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha. You don't have to say that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I mean, hey, I did fulfill your request, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You told me to do what I always do. Well, mission
complete.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The "challenging myself" part was unnecessary.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nothing ever changes, regardless of what my
mindset is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...And that goes for my feelings too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aaargh! My shiny dream is totally out of my
reach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her results this time are quite good. Even if she
didn't finish first, she should still hold her head
high.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But instead, she's feeling down. Perhaps an
overall lack of confidence is a factor. In that case,
what she needs is...
choice_data_list: Nature, do you wanna go on a little trip?
Nature, do you wanna go on a little trip?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A trip? But why now?
choice_data_list: Let's go get a win this summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a risky gamble to ask her to compete in the
Classics right now. She could lose what little
confidence she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning at local races and steadily accumulating
wins will be better for her overall growth.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying... I'm not going to be competing in
Satsuki Sho or Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Because I'm not good enough?
choice_data_list:
Right now, we should focus on building up your
skills.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The way I am now, I couldn't win a
big race even if I entered.
choice_data_list: After this summer, you'll be even faster.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I hope that's the case.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then! Touring in a caravan is more my style,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But we're not actually doing that, are we?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What kind of race are you thinking of?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A graded race that takes place in Kokura... the
perfect race for Nice Nature to gain some
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that one is the same distance as Wakagoma,
right? I think that's a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But summer in Kokura... Yay... I love sweating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to aim for the Kokura Kinen
next!
